---
title: "calluna_hydraulics_plot"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Calluna hydraulics plotting

```{r}
#| label: libraries

library(ggplot2)
library(ggeffects)
library(tidyverse)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
```

```{r}
#| label: import

data <- read.csv("clean_data/DURIN_clean_LygraFire_field_trait_2025.csv")
data$age_class <- factor(data$age_class, levels = c("PIO", "BUI", "MAT"))
```

```{r}
#| label: prep

data <- data |>
  group_by(treatment) |>
  mutate(means_treatment = mean(Area)) |>
  ungroup() 

data <- data[order(-data$means_treatment),]
```

```{r}
#| label: prep raw data

raw_data <- read.csv("raw_data/DURIN_raw_LygraFire_field_trait_2025.csv") |>
  mutate(circ = (4*3.14)*(Area/(Perim.*Perim.))) |>
  group_by(treatment) |>
  mutate(means_treatment = mean(Area)) |>
  ungroup() 

raw_data$age_class <- factor(raw_data$age_class, levels = c("PIO", "BUI", "MAT"))

```

### Plotting

```{r}
#| label: plot




ggplot(data, 
       aes(x = age_class, 
           y = 1, color = nin_type, size = means_treatment, label = round(means_treatment))) +
  geom_point(shape = 21, fill = NA, stroke = 2, position = position_dodge(0.1)) + scale_size_area(max_size = 30) + geom_text(size = 4, position = position_dodge(1)) + theme_minimal() + scale_colour_viridis_d() +
  labs(x = "Age class", color = "NiN type") + guides(size = "none") + theme(axis.text.y = element_blank(), axis.title.y = element_blank())
```

```{r}
#| label: xylem_density

xylem_density <- data |>
  group_by(source_file) |>
  mutate(subset_xylem_total = sum(Area)) |>
  ungroup() |>
  mutate(xylem_density = subset_xylem_total/subset_area) |>
  group_by(plant) |>
  mutate(plant_mean_density = mean(xylem_density)) |>
  ungroup() |>
  group_by(treatment) |>
  mutate(treatment_mean_density = mean(xylem_density))


xylem_mean_plot <- ggplot(data = xylem_density) + geom_point(aes(x = age_class, y = means_treatment, color = nin_type)) + labs(x = "Age class", y = "Mean xylem vessel area in µm") + guides(color = "none")

xylem_density_plot <-ggplot(data = xylem_density) + geom_point(aes(x = age_class, y = treatment_mean_density, color = nin_type)) + labs(x = "Age class", y = "Density (Total xylem area / subset area)") + guides(color = guide_legend("NiN type"))

mean_vs_density <- xylem_mean_plot + xylem_density_plot
mean_vs_density
ggsave("plots/mean_vs_density.png", mean_vs_density)
```

### Density plots

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false

density_data <- data |>
  group_by(subset_id) |>
  mutate(subset_total = sum(Area)) |>
  ungroup() |>
  mutate(density = subset_total/subset_area) |>
  mutate(replicate = substr(source_file, 7,7))

density_plot <- ggplot(data = density_data) + geom_point(aes(x = subset_total, y = density, color = replicate), size = 0.5) + geom_smooth(aes(x = subset_total, y = density, color = replicate), method = "lm") + facet_grid(cols = vars(age_class), rows = vars(nin_type)) + labs(x = "Total xylem area per subset", y = "Density") + guides(color = guide_legend("Plant replicate"))

density_plot
ggsave("plots/xylem_density_plot.png", density_plot)
```

\

```{r}

density_plot_treatment <- ggplot(data = density_data) + geom_point(aes(x = subset_total, y = density), size = 0.5) + geom_smooth(aes(x = subset_total, y = density), method = "lm") + facet_grid(cols = vars(age_class), rows = vars(nin_type)) + labs(x = "Total xylem area per subset", y = "Density") + guides(color = guide_legend("Plant replicate"))

density_plot_treatment
ggsave("plots/xylem_density_plot_treatment.png", density_plot_treatment)
```

### Model

```{r}
#| label: mixed effect model

#creating a dataframe with a weighting that uses both circularity and degree of subset damage. higher values of damage decrease a given point's weighting, while increased circularity increases it's weighting

#data <- data |>
  #filter(subset_damage != 5)

model <- lmer(Area ~ age_class * nin_type +  circ + subset_damage + (1 | plant), data = data)

model_raw <- lmer(Area ~ age_class * nin_type +  circ + subset_damage + (1 | plant), data = raw_data)


pred_mod <- ggpredict(model, terms = c("age_class", "nin_type"))
pred_mod_raw <- ggpredict(model_raw, terms = c("age_class", "nin_type"))

plot(pred_mod)
plot(pred_mod_raw)

ggplot() + geom_point(data = pred_mod, aes(x = x, y = predicted, color = group),  shape = 2, size = 3) + geom_point(data = pred_mod_raw, aes(x = x, y = predicted, color = group), shape = 1)
```

```{r}
summary(model)
```

```{r}
drop1(model, test = "Chisq")
```

```{r}
res <- residuals(model)
plot(res)
```

```{r}
qqnorm(res)
qqline(res)
```

```{r}
#| label: mixed effect model prediction and raw values


mixed_vs_raw <- ggplot() +  geom_point(data = data, aes(x = age_class, y = means_treatment, color = nin_type), shape = 1, size = 6) + geom_point(data = pred_mod, aes(x = x, y = predicted, color = group), shape = 2, size = 2) + labs(x = "Age class", y = "Xylem vessel area") + theme_minimal()

mixed_vs_raw

ggsave("plots/Mixed_effects_vs_raw_averages.png", mixed_vs_raw)

```
